title: `aqash #6140
definition:
1) to be perverse, twist, pervert, make crooked, prove perverse,
    declare perverse
    1a) (Niphal) to be crooked
    1b) (Piel) to twist, distort, pervert, make crooked
    1c) (Hiphil) to declare crooked
    1d) (Qal) perverse
